assertions.title: PageDown 在歌曲列表中翻页

steps.expected: Test passes, asserting PageDown key in Search view sends SearchPageDown command
steps.observed: Test passed. handle_key receives KeyCode::PageDown with view=Search, ui_focus=BodyCenter → sends AppCommand::SearchPageDown. No other commands sent.

steps.expected: search_selected increases by PAGE_SIZE (10), clamped to last index
steps.observed: src/features/search/mod.rs line 76-84: SearchPageDown sets search_selected = (search_selected + 10).min(len-1), confirming page-size increment with boundary clamping.

evidence.reducerCode: src/features/search/mod.rs:76-84 (PAGE_SIZE=10, saturating add with max clamp)

assertions.title: PageUp 在歌曲列表中翻页

steps.expected: Test passes, asserting PageUp key in Search view sends SearchPageUp command
steps.observed: Test passed. handle_key receives KeyCode::PageUp with view=Search, ui_focus=BodyCenter → sends AppCommand::SearchPageUp. No other commands sent.

steps.expected: search_selected decreases by PAGE_SIZE (10), floored at 0
steps.observed: src/features/search/mod.rs line 86-93: SearchPageUp sets search_selected = search_selected.saturating_sub(10), confirming page-size decrement with floor at 0.

steps.expected: Test passes, asserting Home key in Search view sends SearchJumpTop command
steps.observed: Test passed. handle_key receives KeyCode::Home with view=Search, ui_focus=BodyCenter → sends AppCommand::SearchJumpTop. No other commands sent.
src/features/search/mod.rs line 95-100: SearchJumpTop sets search_selected = 0 when list is non-empty and current != 0.

evidence.testOutput: test result: ok. 3 passed; 0 failed (via 'cargo test jump')

steps.expected: Test passes, asserting End key in Search view sends SearchJumpBottom command
steps.observed: Test passed. handle_key receives KeyCode::End with view=Search, ui_focus=BodyCenter → sends AppCommand::SearchJumpBottom. No other commands sent.
src/features/search/mod.rs line 102-108: SearchJumpBottom sets search_selected = search_results.len().saturating_sub(1) when list is non-empty.

evidence.testOutput: test result: ok. 3 passed; 0 failed (via 'cargo test jump')

summary: Tested 4 assertions: all 4 passed. VAL-PAGE-001 (PageDown) verified by page_down_in_search_sends_search_page_down test + reducer code confirming +PAGE_SIZE clamped to last index. VAL-PAGE-002 (PageUp) verified by page_up_in_search_sends_search_page_up test + reducer code confirming -PAGE_SIZE floored at 0. VAL-PAGE-003 (Home/JumpTop) verified by home_in_search_sends_search_jump_top test + reducer code confirming search_selected=0. VAL-PAGE-004 (End/JumpBottom) verified by end_in_search_sends_search_jump_bottom test + reducer code confirming search_selected=last index. All tests ran in both lib.rs and main.rs targets with 0 failures.
